final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of a dragon and knight battle scene in a fantasy setting.

Style/medium: fantasy digital painting, epic cinematic illustration in the spirit of Frank Frazetta and Greg Rutkowski
Composition: dynamic wide-angle action shot, low angle looking up at the dragon, 24mm lens, sweeping diagonal lines suggesting motion, epic scale
Subject: massive dragon mid-roar with flames erupting from its jaws, armored knight charging forward with shield raised and sword drawn
Scene/backdrop: burning medieval castle ruins, lightning storm raging across a dark sky, smoke and embers filling the air
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting from fire below, harsh lightning flashes as key light, ominous and intense atmosphere
Color palette: warm orange and red flames as primary light source, cool blue lightning as accent, deep shadows with purple undertones
Materials/textures: scaly dragon hide with iridescent quality, battered metal armor with battle-worn patina, stone castle textures
Avoid: deformed anatomy, plastic-looking fire, over-lit scene, watermark, generic mobile game aesthetic
